prompt: The render.Render interface method — Render(w http.ResponseWriter) error — is changing its signature to take a context.Context as its first argument: Render(ctx context.Context, w http.ResponseWriter) error. Identify every function that must change for this to compile and work across gin: every type's implementation of the render.Render interface method, and the code that invokes those implementations. Do not include unrelated methods that merely happen to be named Render on non-render types.
